recommendations.title: Dark City
recommendations.overview: A man struggles with memories of his past, including a wife he cannot remember, in a nightmarish world with no sun and run by beings with telekinetic powers who seek the souls of humans.

recommendations.title: I, Robot
recommendations.overview: In 2035, where robots are commonplace and abide by the three laws of robotics, a technophobic cop investigates an apparent suicide. Suspecting that a robot may be responsible for the death, his investigation leads him to believe that humanity may be

recommendations.title: The Crow
recommendations.overview: Exactly one year after young rock guitarist Eric Draven and his fiancée are brutally killed by a ruthless gang of criminals, Draven, watched over by a hypnotic crow, returns from the grave to exact revenge.

recommendations.title: Gods of Egypt
recommendations.overview: A common thief joins a mythical god on a quest through Egypt.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: The Uninvited Guest
recommendations.overview: Mysterious events lead an increasingly paranoid architect to believe a stranger is lurking in his large house.

recommendations.title: Soft & Quiet
recommendations.overview: Taking place in real time, elementary school teacher Emily organizes a mixer of like-minded women, but an altercation between a woman from Emily’s past and the group leads to a volatile chain of events.

recommendations.title: Tenet
recommendations.overview: Armed with only one word - Tenet - and fighting for the survival of the entire world, the Protagonist journeys through a twilight world of international espionage on a mission that will unfold in something beyond real time.

recommendations.title: Cooties
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Horror, Action, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: A mysterious virus hits an isolated elementary school, transforming the kids into a feral swarm of mass savages. An unlikely hero must lead a motley band of teachers in the fight of their lives.

recommendations.title: Murder on the Orient Express
recommendations.overview: In 1935, when his train is stopped by deep snow, detective Hercule Poirot is called on to solve a murder that occurred in his car the night before.
